results.title: Warhammer Armies Project: Alternative Miniatures: Empire
results.content:
Reply
2. 

   Conrad Toskan25 February 2018 at 23:37

   You have to add the Perry brothers to your list. They have great miniatures and the best knights stand in:  
     
     
     
   The scale is just not heroic scale, but that issue remains with most alternativs to GW...

   ReplyDelete

   Replies

   - 

     Mathias Eliasson4 March 2018 at 08:14

     While the Perry Miniatures are great, I do not think they make for great Empire models as they do not really make any landsknechts lookalikes. I have included Perry miniatures in the dogs of war collection however, as they do make great Tileans.

     Delete

     Replies

     Reply
   - 

     Uradel2 January 2019 at 05:41 [...] ## Sunday, 25 February 2018

### Alternative Miniatures: Empire

Here's a collection of suitable miniatures for an Empire army:  

 Gamezone
 Foundry
 Warlord
 Casting Room
 Assault Group (Landsknechts)
 Assault Group (Swiss)
 Artizan
 Old Glory
 Eureka
 Norba
 Avatars of War
 Brother Vinni
 Lead Adventure
 Black Chapel
 MoM
 Shieldwolf
 White Knight
 Last Sword

results.title: Home - Empire Comfort Systems
results.content:
Learn More
 

  # American Made. Amazing Flavor.

  Primo ceramic grills are composed of a proprietary blend of natural materials to make the highest grade of ceramic. Cooking configurations such as grilling, baking, roasting, and smoking are made possible with the Primo patented oval shape.

  Learn More
 

  # New Forest Black Edition

  The Black Edition is the ultimate British Fires experience—designed for those who appreciate the finer things in life. This premium offering combines cutting-edge technology with the nostalgic beauty of hand-crafted Deluxe Real Logs.

  Learn More
 

  # Effortless Heat [...] Learn More
 

  # Fire Refined

  The American Hearth product family starts with our full line of richly detailed all-concrete gas log sets. Our fireplaces and other hearth products all share the same high quality and attention to detail you expect from a company built on a strong American-made foundation.

  Learn More
 

  # The Most Durable Grill Known to Man

  Broilmaster Grills have been around for more than 50 years. In today’s throw-away world, Broilmaster owners routinely keep their grills 20 years or more. These rugged grills are available in a several configurations from versatile all-round models that do everything well, to slow cookers, infrared, and even charcoal models.

  Learn More
 

  # American Made. Amazing Flavor. [...] Empire Comfort Systems

 

  # A Family Company Since 1932

  Since 1932, Empire Comfort Systems has built a tradition of manufacturing excellence. We are committed to building high-quality products to serve our customers for years to come.

  Learn More
 

  # Inspiration On Fire

  Empire Hearth products combine the comfort and beauty of the flame with the innovation of modern technology. From fireplaces to cast iron stoves to our amazingly realistic log sets.

  Learn More
 

  # High-Quality Zone Heating Products

  Empire Heating Systems offers a full line of residential zone heating products – including the most efficient vented heater you can buy. We make all of our vented heaters in the USA, and we offer both American-made and imported vent-free heaters.

  Learn More

| Sold at shop.parks.ny.gov (Accounts can cancel online, same day) | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | ✔ | [...] To purchase:

 Online: Any Empire Pass can be purchased online.
 In-Person (2026 Season Pass only): You may call the park directly for further information and availability. Renewals, multi-season, and lifetime passes are available online only. In-person purchases are non-refundable and non-returnable.
 Mail: Complete an application with a check or money order payable to "NY State Parks" and mail to:  
  Empire Pass  
  New York State Parks  
  Albany, NY 12238
 Print-Friendly Empire Pass Application (pdf)

### Lifetime Empire Pass Card

For $750 you will receive an Empire Pass card with no expiration date. Buy it once and enjoy the parks for your lifetime!

### Need to Replace Your Empire Pass?
